column1: Hey Bekah, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you! which destination were you lookin to book
we don't care! i live in fort lauderdale so preferably not there. prob one of the caribbean destinations like punta, aruba, bahamas and other as well as cancun. wtvr is most fun and good price!
lets do Punta! thats where I'll be
okay! can u send some deets over?!?
we also want it to be enjoyable and not terrible experience haha like the food, water, hotel etc.
Yea I feel you. ill send a few good destinations and options
how many ppl in your group so far?
only 2! just me and my friend :)
okay cool! will def hook it up for y'all
oh dope yea we have a few groups from there. y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Loved “oh dope yea we have a few groups from there. y'all def know how to party lol”
okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
Also my friends are getting an airbnb in Costa Rica. Do u think Costa Rica is a fun sporing break spot
Costa Rica is exactly that, an Airbnb type spring break, more exploratory. not really a college party spring break vibe
gonna send this over in a sec!
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Yea I was thinking the exact same thing ab Costa.. ok ill go check
Ugh its just a lil more expensive then what we wanted bc there is only 2 of us and its without flights.. 😟
ah! which one were you looking at? I'll see what I can do for discount
We are looking at the punta cana 4 night one !
I can get you down to $689 per person if were lookin to book this week!
and then its best to get flights separately on your own. which airport would you want to fly out of? I'll help you find a good one to buy
Okay and what's the name of that hotel
its the Occidental Punta Cana, super dope hotel its where most of our college groups are
ok let me talk w my friend and i'll luk! probs by tom
do you know any other schools that are going to be there during that week?
Coastal Carolina, College of Charleston, Toledo, UNC Wilminghton, Elmira
ok so yea it's like the smaller coastal schools like us lol
hey Bekah whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
Ugh It sounds great but a lot of my friends r warning me ab the water and cleanliness at Occidental but its def the party vibe im looking for
they may be talking about the Occidental Caribe. Not the Occidental Punta Cana. both are in Punta Cana but two different resorts
I've stayed at both, the Occ Punta Cana is super clean, way better amenities than the caribe, rooms are nicer
the Caribe use to be the hot spot. Now its the Occidental Punta Cana
we moved all of our parties there since the experience is way better
Oh bet.. when did u switch?
oooo okayyy! Yea it sounds great! if I were to book it today can u do it for $650😏 tryna keep it in our original budget w flights.
I'll have to ask! that may be a little stretch lol
but lol I'll see what I can do
also, I had some travel agency hacked my debit card somehow. And I'm so scared. It's gonna happen again. Do you swear you won't hack my debit card?😭😭
Nahh we don't roll like that
We don't store card info on file either. like each payment is manual
lol i figured.. and which group are you with again?
I trust you I just want to do my due diligence😌
Lol woowww you don't trust me? I'm offended
no, I do! I'm just curious to know which group I'm booking through
lol nah it's Go Blue Tours. Can look us up on google or wherever
ok! no it's chill i've heard of u guys!
soo I got good news and bad news
bad news is I get there the 5th so I'll either just miss you or only have 1 day with y'all
good news is I got the price down to $674 for the 2 person room
lol yea could either do the 28th to the 4th, 1st to the 5th, or 2nd to 6th. whichever works best for you flight wise
thats for the 4 night package. we have a 5 night but its more expensive
Wordd I'll set that up for you rn and send it over
ok great! thank u... i'm gonna fill this out in a bit
also, do you happen to know how many people are going that week? like who have signed up through go blue
yea tons, I sent you a few of the schools yesterday remember lol
those were some of the schools that booked through us. there are def more and other ppl from other schools will be there as well

ok so I put down my $200 deposit but my friend that's coming with me is currently in another country so she's actually sleeping due to the time difference. Is she able to do it tomorrow? I see that the payment is due today for the $200.
got you, okay cool, I'll put the note on her slot for tomorrow payment
Morning! aight dope dope excited for y'all
yo Bekah! mind adding your flight info to your accounts so we can sched your airport transportation with our team
yes i will .. we haven't looked at flights yet. we will probably know by tomorrow.

hi! do you have any information about the booze cruise? Because we know we definitely want to do one with our other friends that are staying in another resort. but my friends have done a booze cruise in Punta Cana before and they said it was awful because the drinks were literally one jug of rum fruit punch, rather than drink of choice.😂 I also was curious if it was even an option to have our other friends (who are staying at a diff resort) pay you guys for the booze cruise. There's about eight of them, so 10 total
booze cruise is lit, heres a video from last year https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Is4RzNfxeZg
hey which resort are your frineds staying at? just want to make sure our staff will physically be able to get them their booze cruise tickets if they buy them ahead of time
it's okay i don't think we are doing the booze cruise! sorry
all good! I'll take it off your account
good morning! sooo should i just ignore this?
hey yea ignore that, you're all good I removed it for you!
can you have Sarah toss her flight info in when you can?

yeah, sorry. She's in another country so it's hard to get in touch with the time difference. She is going to send me all the flight info now and I will do it when I get to my computer. It will be by this evening I promise.
We are on the same arriving flight and then our returning flight is just an hour difference so we'll be doing the same transportation from into the airport
I can duplicate yours in there to her account if that works
it would be the same transportation time anyway
wait what country is she in rn, she flying back and then immediately going on another trip? lol
she moved from the US a few yrs ago
Hi good morning!! when should we expect to get our info for transportation from airport to hotel?
Hey good morning, that should be in your email inbox, sent a few days ago!
If you don't see it, try going to your 'All Mail' tab. The title of the email is "what to do when you land in Cancun"
Was it in spam? Just curious, hopefully it didn't happen to everybody lol

no, it wasn't; I just didn't get a notification for the email. I don't know if this matters, but it says Cancun in the email and not Punta Cana. But I'm guessing it's the same procedure for both airlines.
Apologies I must've sent over the wrong one. I'll send the updated, but yes overall the same process
You'll want to fill this out before you board
thank you! i think we got all that done already:)
perfect. just text me if you need anything else
hi! how do we get the info on our transportation to airport?
Yo! Slide to the lobby our onsite staff will let you know your exact time. There may be a QR code you scan or they'll just tell you the time
it was great! thank you sm for everything ☺️☺️
